name: SideDimPlusY
_comment: Spike: dim-mode end-to-end test on +y side face. ONE Ø6 mm circle on +y face of a 30x30x20 block, centered on the face (v=-10). Builds in dim mode (no --no-dim). Used to verify the _sketch_uv_to_part refactor wires SKETCHSEGMENT + AddDimension2 correctly on side faces. Expect ONE AddDimension2 popup (for the circle diameter) — tick through it.
